zh.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks於1645年1月19日出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格。她於大約1662年與Johann Peter Schumacher在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1733年2月18日在她的家鄉享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: Heckh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: American shortened form of Flemish and Dutch   Van Hecke  .

variants.name: Heck
meanings: South German: topographic name from Middle High German hecke, hegge ‘hedge’. This surname is common in southern Germany and the Rhineland, and is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
Dutch: topographic name from Middle Dutch heck ‘fence, gate’. Compare Van Hecke .
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a gate or ‘hatch’ (especially one leading into a forest), northern Middle English heck (Old English hæcce). Compare Hatch .

nameMeanings.name: Hendricks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from the personal name   Hendrick  . See also   Hendriks  .

variants.name: Hendrick
meanings: Dutch, Scottish, and English: from the personal nameHendrick (see Henry ).

variants.name: Hendericks
meanings: Dutch: variant of   Hendricks  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is 114.

History: Gerret Hendericks was one of the founders in 1683 of Germantown, PA, the earliest German-speaking settlement in North America, inhabited by immigrants from Germany, the Netherlands, and Switzerland.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks was born on 19 January 1645, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. She married Johann Peter Schumacher about 1662, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 February 1733, in her hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks est née le 19 janvier 1645, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Elle a épousé Johann Peter Schumacher environ 1662, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1733, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks родилась 19 января 1645 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Peter Schumacher около 1662 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 февраля 1733 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.
